title: Math Frenzy
description:
Math Frenzy is a fast-paced arithmetic game that challenges you to solve math problems under pressure. What starts with simple addition and subtraction quickly evolves into a strategic test of speed, accuracy, and decision-making as timers, streaks, items, enemies, and powerful modifiers change the way you play.

Tackle addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and equation-based challenges across multiple game modes. Whether you're chasing high scores, building powerful runs, or competing against friends, every answer counts.

Brain RunBrain Run is the game's primary roguelite-inspired mode.

Choose your path across a branching map filled with quiz rooms, shops, rest stops, treasure chests, mystery events, and powerful boss encounters. Each quiz room challenges you to reach a score target while maintaining a required accuracy rate. Correct answers earn score and money, while mistakes can cost health and trigger penalties.

As you progress, you'll collect Charms that dramatically alter the run. Some reward quick answers, others improve survivability, boost rewards, modify question behavior, or create high-risk, high-reward strategies. Building the right combination of Charms is just as important as solving the math itself.

ArcadeArcade Mode is an endless score attack where every second matters.

Answer questions correctly to build your score, extend your streak, and keep the timer alive. Wrong answers cost precious time and can quickly end a promising run.

As difficulty increases, powerful items can appear to help turn the tide. Freeze the timer, double your score, gain unlimited skips, instantly solve difficult questions, and more as you push for a new personal best.

BattleBattle Mode brings the pressure to local multiplayer.

Compete against friends or CPU opponents in fast-paced math battles where speed and accuracy determine the winner. Correct answers advance your progress, while mistakes give opponents an opportunity to pull ahead.

Use powerful items to disrupt rivals, protect yourself, or create game-changing comebacks. A well-timed item can be just as important as a fast answer.

Features• Three unique game modes: Brain Run, Arcade, and Battle

• Fast-paced arithmetic and equation-solving gameplay

• Roguelite-inspired progression with branching paths

• Dozens of Charms that modify gameplay in meaningful ways

• Shops, rest rooms, chests, mystery events, and boss encounters

• Endless high-score chasing in Arcade Mode

• Local multiplayer and CPU opponents

• Powerful items including Freeze Timer, Double Score, Auto Solve, and more

• Streaks, timers, health, money, score goals, and scaling difficulty

• Controller support

• Easy to learn, difficult to master

Math Frenzy turns simple math into an intense test of focus, strategy, and speed. The question is simple:

Can you solve under pressure?
description_short: Solve fast arithmetic challenges across Brain Run, Arcade, and Battle modes. Build charm loadouts, chase high scores, survive branching runs, and compete locally against friends or CPU opponents.
